programme.title: No Filter Football
programme.desc: A special behind the scenes look at the huge UEFA Champions League semi-final first leg clash between Atletico Madrid and Arsenal at Riyadh Air Metropolitano.

programme.title: UEL & UECL Magazine
programme.desc: Ryan Yates discusses the prospect of emulating Nottingham Forest's historical European feats. Plus, we hear from Morgan Rogers and Jean-Philippe Mateta.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: A unique and fast-paced look at all the best action from the Premier League, including Aston Villa v Spurs, Man United v Liverpool, Arsenal v Fulham, and more.

programme.title: PL Stories: Harry Kewell
programme.desc: Harry Kewell opens up about his electrifying rise at Leeds United, the intense scrutiny he faced at Liverpool, and his new chapter in coaching.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine
programme.desc: Martin Zubimendi discusses his dream of leading Arsenal to a UCL final for the first time in 20 years, while legendary defender Marcel Desailly reflects on his own UCL triumphs.

programme.title: The Cycling Show
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes at Red Bull Bora-Hansgrohe to discover their winning formula of combining top stars, sprint trains and a solid development team.

programme.title: British Superbikes Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from round one of the 2026 British Superbike Championship at Oulton Park in Cheshire.

programme.title: World Superbike Rewind
programme.desc: We rewind to round four of the FIM Superbike World Championship at Balaton Park Circuit in Hungary.

programme.title: Premier League Reload
programme.desc: A whirlwind catch-up from matchday 35 of the Premier League, featuring all the goals and major talking points from Aston Villa v Spurs, Man United v Liverpool, and more.

programme.title: Kenny Allstar's Number 1's
programme.desc: Kenny Allstar meets up with England and Arsenal star Noni Madueke. The pair chat all things firsts and favourites, before Noni steps up to show off his musical talents!

programme.title: Sign Up - Into Football
programme.desc: Fulham Special, featuring head coach Marco Silva and captain Tom Cairney. Glenn Hoddle on the Premier League, FA Cup and World Cup. Plus, England Deaf Women win the Futsal Euros!

programme.desc: Angling magazine show presented by Rob Hughes and Andy Ford, featuring a look at the winter of 2022.

programme.title: Live MLB: Dodgers @ Astros
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball as 2022 winners the Houston Astros welcome back-to-back reigning champions the LA Dodgers.

programme.desc: A look back at the best action from the MLB following Los Angeles Dodgers at Houston Astros.

programme.title: The Cycling Show
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes at Red Bull Bora-Hansgrohe to discover their winning formula of combining top stars, sprint trains and a solid development team.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback - Season 1
programme.desc: We revisit the chaos and drama of the 2017 Mexico City ePrix at Autodromo Hermanos Rodriguez. The race would feature an unforgettable performance by Lucas di Grassi.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback - Season 1
programme.desc: Relive the championship-deciding finale of the 2016/17 Formula E season. Would it be Sebastien Buemi or Lucas di Grassi who would come out on top in Montreal?

programme.desc: A round-up of Tuesday's UEFA Champions League semi-final second leg clash between Arsenal and Atletico Madrid at the Emirates.

programme.desc: A round-up of Tuesday's UEFA Champions League semi-final second leg clash between Arsenal and Atletico Madrid at the Emirates.

programme.title: Playing For Our Future - Cycling
programme.desc: What does the future hold for cycling in the battle against global warming? Reshmin Chowdhury meets people at all levels to discuss how cycling can be a positive force for change.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: This week we delve into the first stage of La Vuelta Feminina, recap Tadej Pogacar's Tour de Romandie debut and preview the upcoming Giro d'Italia.

programme.desc: We go behind the scenes at Red Bull Bora-Hansgrohe to discover their winning formula of combining top stars, sprint trains and a solid development team.

programme.desc: Women's cycling action from stage four of the 2026 Vuelta a Espana, which features a 115km route from Monforte de Lemos to Antas de Ulla.

programme.desc: This weekly MLB highlights show showcases the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: MLB Ultimate Lineup
programme.desc: This episode of MLB Ultimate Lineup looks at the most unbreakable records we ever saw.

programme.title: MLB Prime 9: Greatest Plays
programme.desc: MLB Prime 9 counts down the list of baseball's greatest plays at the plate.

programme.title: MLB Classic: Ozzie Smith
programme.desc: MLB Legend Ozzie Smith recounts his most memorable game where his walk-off home run gave the St Louis Cardinals victory over the LA Dodgers in Game Five of the 1985 NLCS.

programme.desc: Highlights from Ninja A-League Women semi-final first leg ties, including Melbourne Victory v Melbourne City and Brisbane Roar v Wellington Phoenix.

programme.desc: Fulham Special, featuring head coach Marco Silva and captain Tom Cairney. Glenn Hoddle on the Premier League, FA Cup and World Cup. Plus, England Deaf Women win the Futsal Euros!

programme.title: UCL Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: Look back at the 2014 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid. Real left it late to take the game to extra-time before beating their rivals 4-1.

programme.desc: Following a breathtaking first-leg that PSG won 5-4, the stage shifts to the Allianz Stadium, where these European heavyweights collide for a place in the Champions League final.

programme.desc: Our No Filter cameras go behind the scenes of the UEFA Europa League semi-final between Nottingham Forest and Aston Villa at the City Ground.

programme.desc: Nottingham Forest take a one-goal lead to Villa Park as they battle Unai Emery's Aston Villa for a place in the 2026 UEFA Europa League final.

programme.desc: The latest news and action from Rally Portugal and the 2026 World Rally Championship.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: The Breakdown: Gloucester Rugby
programme.desc: David Flatman and Alastair Eykyn visit Gloucester Rugby as they go behind-the-scenes to review the club's progress in recent years, their culture, and ground-breaking concussion study.

programme.title: Cycling: Vuelta a Espana - Stage 4
programme.desc: Women's cycling action from stage four of the 2026 Vuelta a Espana, which features a 115km route from Monforte de Lemos to Antas de Ulla.

programme.title: 2025 Men's Giro d'Italia - Review
programme.desc: A review of the best action and stories from the 2025 Men's Giro d'Italia, as British rider Simon Yates secured a second Grand Tour title.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: This week we delve into the first stage of La Vuelta Feminina, recap Tadej Pogacar's Tour de Romandie debut and preview the upcoming Giro d'Italia.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: Fishing: On the Bank
programme.desc: Angling magazine show presented by Rob Hughes and Andy Ford, featuring a look at the winter of 2022.

programme.title: Climbing World Series Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 IFSC Climbing World Series in Keqiao, China, featuring the men's and women's bouldering events.

programme.title: UCL Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: Take a look back at Borussia Dortmund's 1997 UEFA Champions League final success against Juventus. The German side conquered Europe after a 3-1 victory in Munich.

programme.title: Sign Up - Into Football
programme.desc: Fulham Special, featuring head coach Marco Silva and captain Tom Cairney. Glenn Hoddle on the Premier League, FA Cup and World Cup. Plus, England Deaf Women win the Futsal Euros!

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: This weekly MLB highlights show showcases the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from Major League Baseball as New York Yankees and Texas Rangers do battle at Yankee Stadium. (06.05)

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from round four of the 2026 FIM Superbike World Championship at Balaton Park in Hungary.

programme.title: Live WRC: Rally Portugal
programme.desc: Action from special stages one and two of the 2026 World Rally Championship in Portugal.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: Endurance Uncovered
programme.desc: A special look at the World Endurance Championship, a global series of races that test the limits of both drivers and vehicles.

programme.title: Live WRC: Rally Portugal
programme.desc: Action from special stage three of the 2026 World Rally Championship in Portugal.

programme.title: Live UEL: Freiburg v Braga
programme.desc: Action from the UEFA Europa League semi-final second leg between Freiburg and Braga at Europa-Park-Stadion. The visitors hold a one-goal lead from the first.

programme.title: Cycling: Vuelta a Espana - Stage 5
programme.desc: Women's cycling action from stage five of the 2026 Vuelta a Espana. This 119km flat route takes the peloton from Leon to Astorga.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from Major League Baseball as New York Yankees and Texas Rangers do battle at Yankee Stadium. (06.05)

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series Men
programme.desc: Action from the elite cross country short track at the men's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series Men
programme.desc: Action from the elite downhill at the men's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series Men
programme.desc: Action from the elite cross country Olympic at the men's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: Auckland FC v Melbourne City
programme.desc: Action from the Isuzu UTE A-League Elimination Finals as Auckland FC and Melbourne City go head-to-head at Go Media Stadium.

programme.title: Melbourne Victory v Sydney FC
programme.desc: Action from the Isuzu UTE A-League Elimination Finals as Melbourne Victory and Sydney FC lock horns at AAMI Park.

programme.title: NWSL: Orlando Pride v Washington
programme.desc: Washington Spirit seek a fourth National Women's Soccer League win on the spin as they face off against Seb Hines' Orlando Pride at Inter&Co Stadium.

programme.title: NWSL: Chicago Stars v Portland
programme.desc: Action from the National Women's Soccer League as Chicago Stars face Rob Gale's high-flying Portland Thorns at Martin Stadium.

programme.title: Climbing World Series Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 IFSC Climbing World Series in Keqiao, China, featuring the men's and women's bouldering events.

programme.title: AFL: Sydney Swans v Melbourne
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as the in-form Sydney Swans take on Steven King's Melbourne at the SCG in a clash between two attacking sides.

programme.title: AFL: Geelong v North Melbourne
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Geelong Cats and North Melbourne go head-to-head at GMHBA Stadium. The Cats have won their last 14 games against the Kangaroos.

programme.title: AFL: Sydney Swans v Melbourne
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as the in-form Sydney Swans take on Steven King's Melbourne at the SCG in a clash between two attacking sides.

programme.title: AFL: Gold Coast Suns v GWS Giants
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Gold Coast Suns host GWS Giants at People First Stadium. The Giants have won the past six meetings between these sides.

programme.title: Climbing World Series Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 IFSC Climbing World Series in Keqiao, China, featuring the men's and women's bouldering events.

programme.title: Fishing: On the Bank
programme.desc: Angling magazine show presented by Rob Hughes and Andy Ford, featuring a look at the winter of 2022.

programme.title: Women's FA Cup: Chelsea v Man Utd
programme.desc: Action from the Adobe Women's FA Cup fifth round as reigning champions Chelsea face WSL rivals Manchester United in a repeat of last year's final.

programme.title: Women's FA Cup: Liverpool v Everton
programme.desc: Action from the Adobe Women's FA Cup fifth round as Liverpool face bitter rivals Everton at St Helens Stadium. Who will win this massive Merseyside derby?

programme.title: Women's FA Cup: London City...
programme.desc: ...Lionesses v Tottenham Hotspur. Action from the Adobe Women's FA Cup fifth round as London City Lionesses host Tottenham Hotspur in an all-WSL clash at Hayes Lane.

programme.title: AFL: Collingwood v Hawthorn
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Collingwood take on Hawthorn at the MCG. The Hawks have won six of their past seven games at this venue.

programme.title: AFL: Western Bulldogs v Fremantle
programme.desc: Fremantle Dockers hunt for a seventh straight AFL win as they take on an injury-hit Western Bulldogs at Marvel Stadium.

programme.title: AFL: Adelaide C v P Adelaide
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Adelaide Crows take on rivals Port Adelaide at Adelaide Oval. The Crows have won five of the past six Showdowns.

programme.title: AFL: Essendon v Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Essendon host Brisbane Lions at Marvel Stadium. The Lions won 90-72 when these sides last met.

programme.title: AFL: West Coast Eagles v Richmond
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as West Coast Eagles take on Richmond at Optus Stadium. The Tigers are looking to avoid an eighth defeat in a row.

programme.title: AFL: Geelong v North Melbourne
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Geelong Cats and North Melbourne go head-to-head at GMHBA Stadium. The Cats have won their last 14 games against the Kangaroos.

programme.title: AFL: Carlton v St Kilda
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Carlton meet St Kilda at Marvel Stadium. Can the Blues avoid a sixth straight defeat?

programme.title: AFL: Sydney Swans v Melbourne
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as the in-form Sydney Swans take on Steven King's Melbourne at the SCG in a clash between two attacking sides.

programme.title: AFL: Gold Coast Suns v GWS Giants
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Gold Coast Suns host GWS Giants at People First Stadium. The Giants have won the past six meetings between these sides.

programme.title: Snooker World Championship
programme.desc: Highlights from the final of the 2026 Snooker World Championship between Shaun Murphy and Wu Yize at the Crucible. (04.05)

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: The Ultimate Pool 36Vegas Pairs Cup continues with group seven, headlined by former champions and three-time finalists, Karl Sutton and Shaun Chipperfield.

programme.title: Discovery Golf
programme.desc: We look ahead to the Truist Championship, reflecting on famous victories for Sepp Straka and Rickie Fowler at Quail Hollow, plus a deep dive into the notorious Green Mile.

programme.title: FIA Formula E Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from round seven of the 2026 ABB FIA Formula E World Championship at the iconic Flughafen Tempelhof.

programme.title: FIA Formula E Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from round eight of the 2026 ABB FIA Formula E World Championship at the iconic Flughafen Tempelhof.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: The Ultimate Pool 36Vegas Pairs Cup continues with group seven, headlined by former champions and three-time finalists, Karl Sutton and Shaun Chipperfield.

programme.desc: Action from the Isuzu UTE A-League Elimination Finals as Auckland FC and Melbourne City go head-to-head at Go Media Stadium.

programme.title: Melbourne Victory v Sydney FC
programme.desc: Action from the Isuzu UTE A-League Elimination Finals as Melbourne Victory and Sydney FC lock horns at AAMI Park.

programme.title: Ninja A-League Women Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from Ninja A-League Women semi-final first leg ties, including Melbourne Victory v Melbourne City and Brisbane Roar v Wellington Phoenix.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: This weekly MLB highlights show showcases the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: FIM Speedway Grand Prix Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the opening round of the 2026 FIM Speedway Grand Prix at the legendary Landshut circuit in Germany.

programme.title: Liv Golf Riyadh - Review
programme.desc: A review of the dramatic season opener of the LIV Golf League in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, which went down to the wire.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: A review of the best action and biggest stories from LIV Golf in Adelaide, Australia, as Bryson DeChambeau and Jon Rahm fought it out at the top of the leaderboard.

programme.title: LIV Golf - Hong Kong Review
programme.desc: A review of the best action and biggest stories from LIV Golf at the Hong Kong Golf Club in China, where Legion XIII's Jon Rahm ended his wait for an individual tournament win.

programme.title: LIV Golf - Singapore Review
programme.desc: A review of the biggest stories and best action from LIV Golf Singapore at Sentosa Golf Club, where Bryson DeChambeau recorded a dramatic victory.

programme.title: LIV Golf - South Africa Review
programme.desc: A review of the biggest stories and best action from LIV Golf South Africa, where Bryson DeChambeau sealed consecutive event titles in dramatic fashion.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: We review all the major talking points from the sixth LIV Golf event of 2026 at Club de Golf Chapultepec, where Jon Rahm delivered a commanding display.

programme.title: Live: LIV Golf - Virginia
programme.desc: The seventh LIV Golf event of the year gets underway at the Trump National Golf Club in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Snooker World Championship
programme.desc: Highlights from the final of the 2026 Snooker World Championship between Shaun Murphy and Wu Yize at the Crucible. (04.05)
